name: Tuna Sashimi with Orange Glaze
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Fresh tuna - sliced into 1/4-inch-thick pieces
2 Oranges - peeled and cut into sections
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tip and stem of the tomatoes; discard seeds and core.
2. Slice the tomatoes flat and lay each slice on a plate.
3. Cut lengthwise into 1/4-inch strips, then horizontally into 1/4-inch pieces.
4. Refrigerate in a covered container for at least 4 hours.
5. In a small saucepan over medium-high heat, combine orange juice, green peppercorns (in water), and salt.
6. Bring to a boil and reduce until only 2/3 cup remains.
7. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
8. Transfer to a bowl and beat in vegetable oil to form a glaze.
9. If the mixture is too shiny or appears to separate, add a few drops of water or orange juice.
10. To serve, spoon the glaze onto plates.
11. Arrange sliced tuna on top of the glaze.
12. Garnish with orange sections, remaining green peppercorns, and chopped tomato.
